subject: ssl abandonment - sale to el paso

emails.subject: Re: SSL Abandonment - Sale to El Paso
emails.subject_base: SSL Abandonment - Sale to El Paso
emails.body: We need to make sure this upside doesn't get taken in 2000. It is part of the 2001 plan. What ideas do we have for reserving equivlaent dollars? the TC swap? depending on the outcome of the Carlton order, we may have a couple hundred thousand there? we need to discuss how we want this treated for when it gets to Rod- MK Forwarded by Mary Kay Miller/ET&S/Enron on 11/08/2000 07:24 AM Bob Burleson 11/07/2000 05:03 PM

emails.subject: Re: SSL Abandonment - Sale to El Paso
emails.subject_base: SSL Abandonment - Sale to El Paso
emails.body: The easiest way would be to delay the closing until January. Is there a reason we can't do that? DF From: Mary Kay Miller 11/08/2000 07:28 AM

emails.subject: Re: SSL Abandonment - Sale to El Paso
emails.subject_base: SSL Abandonment - Sale to El Paso
emails.body: It will cost us another month's revenue credit. MK From: Drew Fossum 11/08/2000 08:23 AM
